channel.title: Fix Atlas
channel.description: New AI and developer error fixes from Fix Atlas.

item.title: ComfyUI: CUDA out of memory
item.description: Set batch size to 1 and lower image resolution.

item.title: Cursor: MCP server not working
item.description: Validate the JSON and replace relative paths with absolute paths.

item.title: n8n: webhook not responding
item.description: Activate the workflow before using the production URL.

item.title: Stable Diffusion: black image output
item.description: Try a known compatible VAE.

item.title: Docker: port is already allocated
item.description: Find the process using the port.

item.title: Python: failed building wheel
item.description: Upgrade pip, setuptools, and wheel.

item.title: Ollama: slow response or empty output
item.description: Test with a smaller quantized model.

item.title: npm: ERESOLVE dependency conflict
item.description: Read the first peer dependency conflict in the log.

item.title: Claude Code: permission denied
item.description: Check the file owner and confirm that your current user can edit the project.

item.title: Claude Code: MCP server disconnected
item.description: Run the configured command manually and resolve its first startup error.

item.title: Whisper: ffmpeg not found
item.description: Install FFmpeg using the package method recommended for your operating system.

item.title: Supabase: RLS permission denied
item.description: Confirm the request is authenticated and inspect the current user id.

item.title: Cloudflare Workers: Error 1101: Worker threw exception
item.description: Stream production logs and reproduce one failing request.

item.title: OpenAI API: 429 rate limit exceeded
item.description: Read the error type and headers to distinguish rate limits from quota problems.

item.title: OpenAI API: invalid API key
item.description: Confirm the runtime sees a non-empty key without printing the full secret.

item.title: GitHub: Permission denied (publickey)
item.description: Test the GitHub SSH connection and note which account responds.

item.title: Next.js: hydration mismatch
item.description: Find the first component named in the hydration warning.

item.title: Node.js: JavaScript heap out of memory
item.description: Confirm available system or container memory before raising the Node limit.

item.title: PyTorch: CUDA is not available
item.description: Confirm the operating system sees the GPU with nvidia-smi.

item.title: Hugging Face: 401 unauthorized for gated model
item.description: Open the model page while signed in and request or accept access.

item.title: Ollama: connection refused on port 11434
item.description: Start Ollama and verify the local API from the same environment as the client.

item.title: ComfyUI: missing custom nodes
item.description: Record every missing node name shown by the workflow.

item.title: Docker: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon
item.description: Start Docker Desktop or the operating-system Docker service.

item.title: n8n: execution stuck in running
item.description: Open the execution and identify the last node that actually started.
